name: HRC_SUBSCRIPTION_RUNS
description: Represents subscription runs and its status with requestor information.

columns.Name: RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies a subscription run row.

columns.Name: RUN_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines the Run Type. The valid values are FEED, QUEUE

columns.Name: LATEST_RUN
columns.Comments: Determines if the latest run. The valid values are Y, N

columns.Name: PROCESS_NAME
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies a subscription run row.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Determines the Run Type. The valid values are FEED, QUEUE

columns.Name: USER_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Identifies the user for the run row.

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the start date and time of the run.

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the end date and time of the run.

columns.Name: MSG_COUNT
columns.Comments: Determines the number of messages processed for the run.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Determines the status of the activity run.

columns.Name: STATUS_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Determines the status details of the activity run.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
